returned.objective_summary: Bound (do not implement) a design-first Building whose deliverable is a design report defining the standard BRICK-style 'Claude Workflow' operating graph that preserves Brick/Agent/Link (BAL) law. The report must cover 8 declared points: (1) workflow UX user->COO graph->design/work/QA/closure; (2) BAL mapping node=Brick / performer=Agent / edge=Link; (3) design-first vs direct-work policy; (4) a recommended graph (Design->COO gate->Work->QA fan-out->Closure); (5) where Claude can act as execution QA after the ec43f0b --allowedTools fix vs stay read-only/design; (6) Link/HOLD/reroute policy for QA concerns and reroute replay; (7) checker/profile expectations per phase (quick/core vs dogfood/heavy); (8) a concrete next-Building plan to the P7 customer dogfood capstone. This node only bounds the work; the substantive report authoring is a downstream boundary.
